description: Marriage contract (ketubba). Fragment (upper right corner). In the hand of Mevorakh b. Natan. Dated: Thursday, 5 Nisan 146[9] Seleucid, which is 6 March 1158 CE, under the authority of Shemuel b. Ḥananya. Groom: Yeshuʿa b. Yiṣḥaq b. Shabbetay ha-Mumḥe [...] Shofeṭ. Bride: Sitt al-Sāda bt. Natan, a virgin. Marriage payments: 5 + 20 = 25. (Information from Goitein's index card.)
description_he: מסמך משפטי מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
